expectations.text: stories.json is read to understand STORY-005 context
expectations.evidence: - The quality gate `npm run build` (defined in `stories.json` epic.qualityGates) is the failing gate

expectations.text: progress.md is read for recent history
expectations.evidence: - Progress.md shows STORY-005 completed successfully in iteration 5, but this debug is for a retry scenario where typecheck failed

expectations.text: Output follows the Spectrum debug progress entry format (Timestamp, Quality Gate Failed, Error Output, Investigation Findings, Root Cause, Suggested Fix)
expectations.evidence: During Spectrum iteration 5, STORY-005 ("Build appearance settings panel with live theme preview") failed the `npm run build` quality gate with TypeScript type errors. The story created three new file

expectations.text: Findings are formatted for appending to progress.md
Typecheck error locations (file:line) are parsed and listed
expectations.evidence: ## Debug Report: STORY-005 Typecheck Quality Gate Failure
